user_reviews.Name: Tedhie Nugraha
user_reviews.Description:
This are a place that provide various K POP album, pop light, and various merchandise.

The price was reasonable too.

The atmosphere in the store was quit, too quit for upbeat image of K POP, so playing several K POP songs during store operational hours can create a good vibe for customers.

Overall, reccomended place for K POP lovers.

user_reviews.Name: Virginia Geraldine Hanny Prasetya
user_reviews.Description: just in case you're wondering: tempat ini masi bukaaa. soalnya td aku liat review terakhir 8 bulan lalu jd kirain udh tutup 😁 dari pintu utama baltos naik eskalator sebelah kanan yg ke lantai 1, lurus aja smpe ketemu balkon (?) sblm eskalator naik, nah tokonya di sebelah kanan, kl nengok dikit keliatan kok. deket WC kalo ga salah deh. lengkap bgtttt asliii dn harganya reasonable banget. tetehnya jg baik. bs nitipp album jugaa selama masi ada di korea. bakal sering mampir kesini siiii
user_reviews.text_original: just in case you're wondering: tempat ini masi bukaaa. soalnya td aku liat review terakhir 8 bulan lalu jd kirain udh tutup 😁 dari pintu utama baltos naik eskalator sebelah kanan yg ke lantai 1, lurus aja smpe ketemu balkon (?) sblm eskalator naik, nah tokonya di sebelah kanan, kl nengok dikit keliatan kok. deket WC kalo ga salah deh. lengkap bgtttt asliii dn harganya reasonable banget. tetehnya jg baik. bs nitipp album jugaa selama masi ada di korea. bakal sering mampir kesini siiii
user_reviews.text_translated: just in case you're wondering: is this place still open. because I saw the last review 8 months ago so I thought it was closed 😁 from the main door of Baltos, take the escalator on the right to the 1st floor, go straight until you find the balcony (?) before the escalator goes up, the shop is on the right, if you look a little you can see it. It's near the toilet if I'm not mistaken. It's really complete and the prices are very reasonable. The staff are also nice. You can also ask for albums as long as you're still in Korea. I'll be stopping by here often

user_reviews.Name: lalalau
user_reviews.Description: The cutest kpop store in Bandung 😆💗 Love the atmosphere! It is pretty small but very cute^^ They sell fanmade kpop goods (mostly boy groups) here you can find stickers, postcards, pc, pc holder (acrylic), keychains and so much more! Also they have a photobooth so don't forget to give it a go when visiting! Note that this place only accepts non-cash payments, 10/10 would recommend 🤍

user_reviews.Name: Doel Maksum
user_reviews.Description: هذا المتجر يقع في الطابق الرابع ، وهو خيار مثالي لمحبي الموضة والإكسسوارات العصرية. يوفر المتجر مجموعة متنوعة من المنتجات لجميع الأعمار، بما في ذلك : الحقائب، الساعات، النظارات الأنيقة، الصنادل، الدمى، القبعات، المحافظ، الأحذية، والترامس، وغير ذلك مع تشكيلاته المحدثة وأسعاره المناسبة. يقدم المتجر خيارات رائعة لإكمال الإطلالة، بالإضافة إلى العديد من الإكسسوارات الأخرى التي تلبي احتياجات العملاء.
user_reviews.text_original: هذا المتجر يقع في الطابق الرابع ، وهو خيار مثالي لمحبي الموضة والإكسسوارات العصرية. يوفر المتجر مجموعة متنوعة من المنتجات لجميع الأعمار، بما في ذلك : الحقائب، الساعات، النظارات الأنيقة، الصنادل، الدمى، القبعات، المحافظ، الأحذية، والترامس، وغير ذلك مع تشكيلاته المحدثة وأسعاره المناسبة. يقدم المتجر خيارات رائعة لإكمال الإطلالة، بالإضافة إلى العديد من الإكسسوارات الأخرى التي تلبي احتياجات العملاء.
user_reviews.text_translated: Located on the fourth floor, this store is an ideal choice for fashion and accessories lovers. The store offers a diverse range of products for all ages, including bags, watches, stylish eyewear, sandals, dolls, hats, wallets, shoes, thermoses, and more, with updated collections and affordable prices. The store offers great options to complete your look, in addition to a wide range of other accessories to meet customers' needs.

user_reviews.Name: Moncils channel
user_reviews.Description: Tokonya hampir selalu ramai dikunjungi. Gapernah masuk sih, cuman kayanya emang lengkap isi nya karena gapernah sepi. Sekarang udah ada mineral water jadi kalau lagi belanja di lantai dua terus urgent butuh minum bisa beli disini yaa🤭🤭 cukup ramah sih pelayanannya. Boleh dicoba dateng kesini yaa
user_reviews.text_original: Tokonya hampir selalu ramai dikunjungi. Gapernah masuk sih, cuman kayanya emang lengkap isi nya karena gapernah sepi. Sekarang udah ada mineral water jadi kalau lagi belanja di lantai dua terus urgent butuh minum bisa beli disini yaa🤭🤭 cukup ramah sih pelayanannya. Boleh dicoba dateng kesini yaa
user_reviews.text_translated: The shop is almost always crowded with visitors. I've never been in, but I think it's really well-stocked because it's never empty. Now they have mineral water, so if you're shopping on the second floor and urgently need a drink, you can buy it here. 🤭🤭 The service is quite friendly. You might want to try coming here.
